submission_message: With limited data for solo/indie tile-map expansion, TileFlow provides the most practical result.

baseline_policy.pretrained_hf_weights: disallowed for MarioGPT and MarioDiffusion in this runner
baseline_policy.mariogpt_same_data: external MarioGPT code path trained from scratch on the same project training split with a small config
baseline_policy.mariodiffusion_same_data: external MarioDiffusion code path trained from scratch on the same project training split with a small config
baseline_policy.projection: External open-ended generators are projected into the center_expand contract by preserving the known center cells after generation.

notes: Main benchmark only: same-data, no Hugging Face pretrained baseline weights, center_expand task, 20-epoch training budget.
External baseline repositories and baseline checkpoints are intentionally excluded from the submitted repository.
